_comment: Ground truth for Ali Hadi case #7 'SysInternals' (fake installer, persistence).
Tier: ORANGE (practice only) — single E01, answers instructor-gated. Use as a
build/iteration fixture; do not lean on the score for accuracy claims.
Scenario: a trojanized/fake SysInternals installer drops a payload and establishes
license: Ali Hadi DFIR challenges — free for research/education (answers gated)

findings.description: Trojanized/fake SysInternals installer executed by the user
findings.artifact_hint: Masquerading installer in Downloads; MFT + prefetch

findings.description: Persistence established via Run key, scheduled task, or service
findings.artifact_hint: SOFTWARE Run keys / Tasks / Services hive

findings.description: Dropped payload binary written to disk by the installer
findings.artifact_hint: Dropped binary in ProgramData/AppData; MFT creation

Network beacon / C2 connection from the payload
